[puppeteer-sharp] *

comment: BiDi driver doesn't support custom WebSocket factories
testIdPattern: [launcher.spec] PuppeteerSharp should support custom websocket

comment: Firefox native BiDi does not return goog:partitionKey or goog:sourceScheme extension data
testIdPattern: [cookies.spec] Cookie specs Page.setCookie should set a cookie with a partitionKey

comment: ASP.NET Core Kestrel does not support sending empty HTTP reason phrases - it defaults to 'OK' for status 200
testIdPattern: [network.spec] network Response.statusText handles missing status text

comment: BiDi driver does not expose pending protocol callbacks for DebugInfo tracking
testIdPattern: [debugInfo.spec] DebugInfo Browser.debugInfo should work

comment: WebDriver BiDi does not support console location info on fetch failures
testIdPattern: [page.spec] Page Page.Events.Console should have location when fetch fails

comment: WebDriver BiDi does not support getting a Handle for log args
testIdPattern: [page.spec] Page Page.Events.Console should return remote objects

comment: Firefox does not support getting console remote objects
testIdPattern: [page.spec] Page Page.Events.Console should return remote objects

comment: WebDriver BiDi does not support console log type differentiation
testIdPattern: [page.spec] Page Page.Events.Console should trigger correct Log

comment: Firefox BiDi does not support console timing functions - https://bugzilla.mozilla.org/show_bug.cgi?id=1866749
testIdPattern: [page.spec] Page Page.Events.Console should work for different console API calls with timing functions

comment: Firefox does not support service_worker extensions via BiDi
testIdPattern: [webExtension.spec] webExtension can install and uninstall an extension

comment: Firefox BiDi does not support targetFilter option in puppeteer.launch
testIdPattern: [launcher.spec] Launcher specs Puppeteer Puppeteer.connect should support targetFilter option in puppeteer.launch

comment: Firefox BiDi returns extra input events for shifted keys on macOS
testIdPattern: [keyboard.spec] Keyboard should report shiftKey

comment: WebDriver BiDi does not support window bounds API
testIdPattern: [browser.spec] Browser specs Browser.get|setWindowBounds should get and set browser window bounds

comment: Browser.add|removeScreen not available in headless Chrome on Windows
testIdPattern: [browser.spec] Browser specs Browser.add|removeScreen should add and remove a screen

comment: Firefox BiDi does not support response body interception - https://github.com/w3c/webdriver-bidi/issues/747
testIdPattern: [network.spec] network Response.buffer *

testIdPattern: [network.spec] network Response.json *
